scripts.build: npm run build -w @aurora/slot-engine && npm run build -w @aurora/api
scripts.play: npm run build:web && env DEMO_MODE=true npm run dev
scripts.test: npm run build -w @aurora/slot-engine && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @aurora/slot-engine && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
